content.problemStatement:
To find the remainder when a number is divided by 2, you can simply check if the number is even or odd:

  • If the number is even, the remainder when divided by 2 is 0.
    • Any number ending with 0, 2, 4, 6 or 8 is even.
  • If the number is odd, the remainder when divided by 2 is 1.
    • Any number ending with 1, 3, 5, 7 or 9 is odd.

For example:

  • Number: 102
    • Remainder when divided by 2: 0 (even)
  • Number: 145
    • Remainder when divided by 2: 1 (odd)
  • Number: 256
    • Remainder when divided by 2: 0 (even)
  • Number: 379
    • Remainder when divided by 2: 1 (odd)

Related Articles,

  • Divisibility By 2
  • Dividend, Divisor, Quotient and Remainder
